posts.text: Euro-zone imports of intellectual property services from America have ballooned to $200bn a year and counting. Can the bloc escape its dependence on the tech giants? https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/05/21/how-europe-is-fighting-for-digital-sovereignty?taid=6a117145acead50001d7eec0&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
